T_bar.description: Sample average of monthly product demands over 10 months, the variable whose deviation from the population mean μ is being bounded.

n.description: Sample size (number of months of observed demand), used to compute the variance of the sample mean.

k.description: The multiplier of σ specifying the deviation threshold |T̄ − μ| ≥ 3σ, used in the Chebyshev bound calculation.
